fontSize.label: Taille de police
fontSize.description: Base font size in pixels for the code editor.

fontFamily.label: Famille de police
fontFamily.description: Monospace font for the code editor. Use commas for fallbacks.

wrap.label: Retour à la ligne
wrap.description: Line wrapping to fit the editor width or allow horizontal scrolling.

tabSize.label: Taille de tabulation
tabSize.description: Number of spaces per tab character for indentation.

highlightLine.label: Surligner la ligne
highlightLine.description: Visual highlight on the line where the cursor is positioned.

matchBrackets.label: Correspondance des parenthèses
matchBrackets.description: Matching bracket highlighting near the cursor.

trailingComma.label: Virgule finale
trailingComma.description: Trailing commas in multi-line structures when formatting.

semi.label: Point-virgule
semi.description: Semicolons at the end of every statement.

singleQuote.label: Guillemet simple
singleQuote.description: Single quotes instead of double quotes.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Base font size in pixels for the notes editor.

fontFamily.label: Text Font
fontFamily.description: CSS font-family value. Use commas to specify fallbacks.

codeFontFamily.label: Monospace Font
codeFontFamily.description: Font for inline code and fenced code blocks.

lineHeight.label: Line Height
lineHeight.description: Spacing between lines. Relaxed is easier to read, compact fits more content.

indentSize.label: Indent Size
indentSize.description: Number of spaces per indent level for lists and nested content.

limitWidth.label: Limit Width
limitWidth.description: Constrain content to a comfortable reading width (700px).

lineNumbers.label: Line Numbers
lineNumbers.description: Show line numbers in the gutter. Only available in Raw mode.

theme.label: Thème
theme.dirDescription: Place your JSON theme files in this folder.

port.label: Port API
port.description: Numéro de port pour le serveur API (nécessite un redémarrage de l'application). Plage valide: 1024-65535.
